title: Luke Skywalker's starship (disambiguation)
content:
[[Luke Skywalker]] (and his [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|legends counterpart]]) used a number of starships over the years.

==Canon==
===X-wings===
*'''''[[Red Five (T-65B X-wing starfighter)|Red Five]]''''', a [[T-65B X-wing starfighter]] Skywalker flew at the [[Battle of Yavin]].

===Other vessels===
*'''[[Breha (starship)|''Breha'']]''', diplomatic vessel resembling a [[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship|J-type 327 Nubian starship]] used by Skywalker and [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] on a [[Mission to Tibrin|mission]] to [[Tibrin]].
*A [[Luke Skywalker's ship|vessel]] used by Skywalker around the time period of the [[Battle of Jakku]].

==Legends==
===X-wings===
*'[[AA-589/Legends|''AA-589''']], a [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighter]] Skywalker flew during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and through the [[Thrawn campaign]].

===Other vessels===
*'''[[Civilian craft (Fondor)]]''', craft used by Skywalker to travel undercover from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] to [[Mission to Fondor (Galactic Civil War)|spy on]] the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].
*'''[[Commandeered transport]]''', ship Skywalker and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] stole to escape [[Tarkin (superweapon)|the Tarkin]] shortly before [[Infiltration of the Tarkin|its destruction]].
*'''''[[Jedi Explorer]]''''', the first starship used by Skywalker during the [[Transfer essence|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand|campaign]]
*'''''[[Jedi Explorer II]]''''', the replacement for the destroyed first ''Jedi Explorer''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's freighter]]''', freighter Skywalker returned to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] aboard when seeking [[blockade runner]]s for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's scout craft]]''', ship Skywalker and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] acquired on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]].
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's scout ship]]''', ship Skywalker used to scout for a new Rebel base in the [[Drexel system/Legends|Drexel system]] before crashing there.
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's shuttle]]''', shuttle Skywalker used to travel to [[Solay]].
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's starship (Tatooine)]]''', vessel Skywalker used on missions to [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] and [[Mission to Tatooine (Luke Skywalker)|Tatooine]].
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's starship (Harix)]]''', vessel Skywalker used on his missions to [[Harix]].
*'''[[Power-gem attack ship]]''', craft used by Skywalker and [[Vrad Dodonna]] in an attempt to bring down the shields of the ''Executor''.
*'''[[Rebel scout ship]]''', vessel Skywalker and Organa used to [[Mission to Jarnollen|scout]] [[Jarnollen]] as a possible Rebel base.
*'''[[Rebel smuggling ship]]''', craft Skywalker used on his mission to [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]] before ultimately being forced down on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].
*'''[[Leia Organa's Rebel scout craft]]''', craft used as a scout ship by Skywalker and Organa to [[Mission to Akuria II|make contact]] with the [[Akuria Rebel Base]].
*'''[[Unidentified space yacht]]''', yacht used by Skywalker and [[Callista Ming]] to travel from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry]] [[Comet/Legends|comet]], [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], and the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].

{{Disambig}}
